role_summary: the tax manager oversees direct and indirect tax planning, compliance, and litigation  support to minimize tax risk and ensure regulatory adherence.
responsibilities: • manage income tax, gst, and other statutory tax filings   • develop tax plannin g strategies to optimize tax liability   • handle tax assessments, audits, and notices   • monitor changes in tax laws and ensure compliance   • coordinate with consultants and tax authorities   • maintain accurate tax documentation and reports
qualifications: • ca qualification with specialization in taxation   • strong understanding of tax laws and procedures   • analytical and strategic thinking   • attention to detail and compliance focus
